'''ngatovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feal|feal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-t-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feal|feal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ngatovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæteveth|ngæteveth]] || [[word:ngætevej|ngætevej]] || [[word:ngætevesh|ngætevesh]] || [[word:ngæteve|ngæteve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngatotovoth|ngatotovoth]] || [[word:ngatotovoj|ngatotovoj]] || [[word:ngatotovosh|ngatotovosh]] || [[word:ngatotovo|ngatotovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngatovoth|ngatovoth]] || [[word:ngatovoj|ngatovoj]] || [[word:ngatovosh|ngatovosh]] || [[word:ngatovo|ngatovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngatofvoth|ngatofvoth]] || [[word:ngatofvoj|ngatofvoj]] || [[word:ngatofvosh|ngatofvosh]] || [[word:ngatofvof|ngatofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngatovotho|ngatovotho]] || [[word:ngatovojo|ngatovojo]] || [[word:ngatovosho|ngatovosho]] || [[word:ngatovoko|ngatovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngatovoth|ngatovoth]] || [[word:ngatovoj|ngatovoj]] || [[word:ngatovosh|ngatovosh]] || [[word:ngatovo|ngatovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngatovothol|ngatovothol]] || [[word:ngatovojol|ngatovojol]] || [[word:ngatovoshol|ngatovoshol]] || [[word:ngatovokol|ngatovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngatovothotho|ngatovothotho]] || [[word:ngatovojojo|ngatovojojo]] || [[word:ngatovoshosho|ngatovoshosho]] || [[word:ngatovoko|ngatovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngatovothon|ngatovothon]] || [[word:ngatovojon|ngatovojon]] || [[word:ngatovoshon|ngatovoshon]] || [[word:ngatovokon|ngatovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngatovothoro|ngatovothoro]] || [[word:ngatovojoro|ngatovojoro]] || [[word:ngatovoshoro|ngatovoshoro]] || [[word:ngatovokoro|ngatovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
